_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Maintain network infrastructure, including software and hardware devices
reference_document_element_description: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.464), DA-S-007 (DA, cosine: 0.447).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.571). Shared vocabulary: [infrastructure, maintain]. NICE-only terms [devices, hardware, network, software] vs WIDAI-only terms [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, networking] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.902 (P=0.914, R=0.891). P exceeds R by 0.023 — the NICE element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Maintain network infrastructure, including software and hardware devices" and "Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.571 ≈ STS 0.571 (gap 0.000). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [infrastructure, maintain] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [infrastructure, maintain]. NICE-only: [devices, hardware, network, software]. WIDAI-only: [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, networking].
